reasoning: Arithmetic intensity is very low (0.25 FLOP/byte), but this is not bandwidth-limited because DRAM utilization is only 45.7% of peak, below the >50% memory-bound threshold. The dominant stall is Long Scoreboard at 69.3% with 92.5% occupancy, indicating warps are mostly waiting on load completion rather than lacking parallelism; the 100% L2 hit rate and simple load-add-store pattern suggest latency from dependent memory operations, not compute or spilling.
